{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135514D30176490E725B20061D"}"},"total":632},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7582522264785961752","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"是我很喜欢的设定，主角是动物，可以契约动物当领主净化领地的同时也会和人类参加副本游戏。微恐设定，推理情节有点像对着答案写过程，对各种动物和人物心理描写比较浅。喜欢看新设定爽文的可以试试"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765444362,"group_id":"7343653837200165912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"评论留一线，日后好相见。没有功劳，只有苦劳的作者也要给予肯定！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5fXigccbR3ZA6AMzhw2eCg=","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/55d1eb5483714e149faa65ac608b4d35~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776787431&x-signature=TK0HH5ZMoAQNGdFlu5zyklAOl70%3D","user_id":"193977720769005","user_name":"扶我起来我还能看qwq"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"193977720769005","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7343653837200165912","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽】+【进化】+【领主种田】
在异界入侵的蓝星世界，齐夜变成一只麻雀，在恐怖的S级异界副本安了家。

　　觉醒动物领袖职业，收集散落在森林中的动物们，赋予动物升阶的能力，带领它们成长和进化。

　　从一只弱不禁风的麻雀，成为称霸一方的动物之神。

　　将一片鸟不拉屎的腐败森林，建设成美丽清新的神圣庄园。

　　当人类冒险者为了生存，在异界中尔虞我诈，争夺资源之时，齐夜早已带领着动物们击退恶神，建立起了一片理想乐土，并向异界副本发起远征。
　　渐渐地，在异界副本冒险的人类中，流传起了这样一个怪谈。

　　宁愿跟副本里的恶神邪兽们打个你死我活，也绝对不要招惹任何一只从你身边路过的可爱动物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6e48cc25cffd8e0a0a5e9fb6eef9a47d","author":"一只麻雀鸭","author_id":"","book_id":"7343653837200165912","book_name":"麻雀也能当冒险者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9788人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7343653843667780120","read_count":"9788","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2738881"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1290","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,宠物,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/421089a5806ec0c12da4de9df50b71e4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429314&x-signature=mPGZEk4%2BNydp2JfcEpqcIX32Z28%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"11444756420122","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"74"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135514D30176490E725B20061D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":10,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2708,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8776,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":6022},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7394008108585632537","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看，就是太短了，一天就看完了，主角的性格也很符合我口味，应该是无女主吧，暂时还没什么毒点，挺好的"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1721554818,"group_id":"7343653837200165912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一串只喜欢看爽文的数据","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/HGkQEvdetQbTJGRxKYdsmfAT2sCJiGwQZgxXM3YGlY","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/336924b44c8e4e668fb3ec778c132334~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776793660&x-signature=VgtdB9AwztFA0rWih2mu62RF%2FRk%3D","user_id":"2585647760024157","user_name":"朝辞似海"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2585647760024157","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1726539137,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE4D8","can_worn":false,"id":4,"name":"元气满满","small_url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/9b065c2d8cda96cbf7fdda5c311d871a","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d04cdb6a2447c1029287dc9120659d09"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7343653837200165912","book_info":{"abstract":"【御兽】+【进化】+【领主种田】
在异界入侵的蓝星世界，齐夜变成一只麻雀，在恐怖的S级异界副本安了家。

　　觉醒动物领袖职业，收集散落在森林中的动物们，赋予动物升阶的能力，带领它们成长和进化。

　　从一只弱不禁风的麻雀，成为称霸一方的动物之神。

　　将一片鸟不拉屎的腐败森林，建设成美丽清新的神圣庄园。

　　当人类冒险者为了生存，在异界中尔虞我诈，争夺资源之时，齐夜早已带领着动物们击退恶神，建立起了一片理想乐土，并向异界副本发起远征。
　　渐渐地，在异界副本冒险的人类中，流传起了这样一个怪谈。

　　宁愿跟副本里的恶神邪兽们打个你死我活，也绝对不要招惹任何一只从你身边路过的可爱动物。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/6e48cc25cffd8e0a0a5e9fb6eef9a47d","author":"一只麻雀鸭","author_id":"","book_id":"7343653837200165912","book_name":"麻雀也能当冒险者","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"9788人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":74,"name":"宠物","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=74&name=宠物&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":864,"name":"副本","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=864&name=副本&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7343653843667780120","read_count":"9788","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2738881"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"1290","tags":"都市高武,都市,系统,穿越,宠物,副本","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/421089a5806ec0c12da4de9df50b71e4~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779429314&x-signature=mPGZEk4%2BNydp2JfcEpqcIX32Z28%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"11444756420122","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"70"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323135514D30176490E725B20061D"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":6,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8266,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":9950},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7593650704771138328","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"偶然点进这本书，被书名《麻雀也能当冒险者》吸引，一口气读下来竟有些上头。目前评分8.7，个人认为实至名归。
 亮点推荐：
设定新颖，反差感拉满
主角穿越成一只麻雀，在危机四伏的异界副本中挣扎求生——这个开局就充满戏剧张力。不同于常见的人类称霸路线，作者以“动物领袖”职业切入，通过收服动物、赋予进化、建设家园的视角展开故事，既有新鲜感，又暗含“弱小逆袭”的爽感逻辑。

融合元素多而不乱
书中将“御兽+进化+种田+系统”巧妙编织。主角不仅要在副本中生存，还要经营森林、培养动物军团，甚至对抗恶神。剧情层次丰富，既有轻松有趣的养成瞬间，也有紧张激烈的副本征战，节奏张弛有度。

文笔流畅，画面感强
作者描写动物生态、森林景观、战斗场面都颇具想象力。尤其是动物们逐渐成长、互动的情节，生动有趣，让人忍不住想象那片“神圣庄园”的模样。

💡 值得鼓励与期待：

目前剧情仍处于展开阶段，世界观铺设扎实，但主线推进稍显缓慢。部分细节（如能力体系、时间线）可进一步细化，避免前后矛盾。另外更新章节确实不多，建议养肥再宰，但值得放入书架持续关注。

📖 适合读者：

喜欢异界冒险、御兽文、种田建设、反套路主角的读者应该会很对胃口。如果你厌倦了龙傲天套路，想看点“小而美”的成长叙事，这只麻雀或许能带来惊喜。

最后一句总结：

这是一本创意满分、诚意在线的潜力之作。当人类还在尔虞我诈，一只麻雀已悄悄走上成神之路——期待作者后续铺开更宏大的动物王国史诗。","text_exts":[{"e":521,"s":518,"text":"龙傲天","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742453145B20061D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593650704771138328%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227343653837200165912%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E9%BE%99%E5%82%B2%E5%A4%A9%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":603,"s":599,"text":"成神之路","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%88%90%E7%A5%9E%E4%B9%8B%E8%B7%AF&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742453145B20061D%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227593650704771138328%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227343653837200165912%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%88%90%E7%A5%9E%E4%B9%8B%E8%B7%AF%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768036443,"group_id":"7343653837200165912","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7+PRF7mqF8eiB3BDd8EPULumH/3PxerwCCCQLAKaZpe","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2531537884036425","user_name":"千媚宫的陈也俊"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2531537884036425","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":
